name: Optimize hot path: avoid double-cloning of DIDs/URIs

description: Avoid double-cloning DIDs/URIs: consume original vectors when partitioning uncached items instead of cloning strings.

asi.impact: Reduces String allocations for uncached items by moving ownership instead of cloning

description: Convert TurboCache methods from async to sync: removed unnecessary async/await overhead on cache operations.

asi.change: Changed all TurboCache methods (get/set/check/clear/get_hit_rates) from async to sync, removing futures overhead
asi.impact: Eliminates async wrapper overhead on every cache operation (~2 async hops per cache call)
